"'''A Night at Tosche Station'''" was a web enhancement for [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]] published on [[Wizards.com]] on [[June 21]], [[2001]].

{{Website-stub}}

==Plot summary==
A group of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]], planning to meet a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] with a batch of [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifles]], are stuck inside [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine's]] [[Tosche Station/Legends|Tosche Station]] during one of the worst sandstorms in years. The eclectic group of beings trapped with them includes a group of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] waiting out the storm.
